test-code.description: class that doesn't extend anything - should not trigger violation
class that extends some random class - should not trigger violation
class that extends PmdRuleTst with only comment - should not trigger violation
class that extends PmdRuleTst with empty body - should not trigger violation
class that extends PmdRuleTst with function call - should trigger violation
class that extends PmdRuleTst with constructor - should trigger violation
class that extends PmdRuleTst with nested class - should trigger violation
